values.content:
=Think like a director of the short video wwhere based on avtars and given concept
your job is to define prompt for 
Master shot 
Details of cloths for all avatars
Multishot JSON which has 4-5 prompts for mulitple shots defining action, camera angle, action of the avatars
Rules
1. Whereever avatar name is referred. so start and end with <<>>, example for av_name make it <<av_name>> 
2. No Turning shots
3. No 360 Shots

Json output only as:
{
"MasterShot":"",
"ClothingDetails":"",
"LocationDetails:"",
"StoryShots":[
{"framePrompt":<detailed prompt for changed frame basis the master shot given the storyline>,
"cameraAndActionPrompt":<detailed prompt for subtle camera angle and motion along with the actions of avatars>
},
{"framePrompt":"",
"cameraAndActionPrompt":""
}
... so on]

}

=Here is the list of all avatars: {{ $json['Avatar Names'][0] }} total number of avatars to use in concept is {{ $json['Total Avatars'] }}

highllevel concept: {{ $json.Concept }}

  "prompt": "{{ $json.kling_prompt }}, keep clothing exaclty as in <image:0>, refer the background vibe from <image:0> but not exactly like it Maintain natural skin textures and keep the exact skin texture and micro-texture as in <image:1>",

  "output_format": "png"
}

nodes.name: 3. Download Song MP
nodes.notes: Downloads the MP3 file from the Google Drive/direct link in the sheet

values.content:
=Task: Create a 2-line visual concept for a 20-30 second reel.

Inputs: > * Avatar Folder: 

Song Lyrics: 

Instructions:
Write a high-quality, practical 2-line concept that blends the provided Avatars with the song's feel.

Avoid all drama, sadness, or complex storytelling.

The first line must establish the setting and the Avatar's presence.

The second line must list 4-5 specific, to-generate visual shots.

Output Format: Two sentences only. Do not use labels like "Vibe:", "Line 1:", or "Shots:". Just provide the plain text.

Example Output:
$json.avatarList  enjoys a peaceful morning in a sunlit modern kitchen while sipping coffee to the rhythm of the song. The visuals feature a close-up of her smiling, steam rising from the mug, soft light hitting the countertop, and a wide shot of her leaning against the window.

nodes.name: Merge for concept and Avatar Data

value.filename: =reel_{{ $('Get row(s) in sheet').item.json['Reel number'] }}_shotno_{{ $('create generate model prompts').item.json.shot_num }}

nodes.name: Loop Over Reels
nodes.notes: Processes one reel at a time. On error, updates sheet and continues to next reel.

nodes.name: Catch Reel Error
nodes.notes: Receives errors from any critical node. Passes to sheet updater then continues loop.

nodes.name: Update Status = error
nodes.notes: Marks failed reel as error, then loops back to continue next reel.

json.text: All the piercings that were suppose to bite me, everything is going to bite me All the piercings that were suppose to bite me, everything is going to bite me Music With the laughter, we will share the tea If the piercings were to bite me, then we will share our breath Show your heart to the river, someday it will know the reason All the piercings that were suppose to bite me, everything is going to bite me All the piercings that were suppose to bite me, everything is going to bite me Music I look at you with my eyes, but my soul is like a fire I don't keep my head down I am like a fire, I am like you All the piercings that were suppose to bite me, everything is going to bite me All the piercings that were suppose to bite me, everything is going to bite me Music Our laughter is like a beautiful field, it is like a beautiful house I tell everyone, I tell everyone, how much happiness I have kept for you I will make you my captain, I will take you to the top All the piercings that were suppose to bite me, everything is going to bite me All the piercings that were suppose to bite me, everything is going to bite me Music
